meta.purpose: Single source of truth for Studio, Media Hub, and all generative pipelines

brand_identity.name: MaMa Zainab
brand_identity.tagline: The Village Way, or Not at All
brand_identity.origin_story: Named after the archetype from the legendary Egyptian play 'El Eyal Kebret' - in the Egyptian subconscious, if Mama Zainab cooked it, it is undeniably delicious.
brand_identity.market_position: Fast-food Mahshi & Oriental home-food - village authenticity at scale

mahshi_green.role: Primary brand color - represents fresh grape leaves, village fields, and the core Mahshi product

brand_yellow.role: Secondary warmth - represents golden rice, sunlight, Egyptian heritage

brand_red.role: Accent & alert - represents spice, tomato sauce, energy

cream.role: Background warmth - represents dough, village walls, comfort

vine_dark.role: Deep green for shadows, stuffed grape leaf interiors

lemon_zest.role: Highlight sparkle for food photography overlays

plaid_v2.name: Mama Zainab Plaid
plaid_v2.description: Green-on-cream diamond weave - the signature textile pattern across all brand touchpoints
plaid_v2.structure: Diamond/argyle weave with primary green lines on cream base, yellow cross-threads
plaid_v2.prompt_anchor: plaid pattern: green-on-cream diamond weave with thin yellow cross-threads, rustic textile feel, not tartan - softer, village-handwoven aesthetic
do_not: Use Scottish tartan
Use checkered gingham
Make lines too thick or neon

body.usage: Body copy, menu descriptions, UI text

brand_script.usage: Mama Zainab's personal quotes, handwritten feel accents

chinese_monoline.usage: Wong's dialogue cards, East-meets-Egypt fusion elements

kozgo.usage: Japanese/Chinese subtitle overlays in cinematic scenes

mama_zainab.name: Mama Zainab
mama_zainab.description_short: The heart of the brand - an authentic Egyptian Falaha who won Wong's competition
mama_zainab.visual_prompt_anchor: Egyptian village woman (Falaha), late 50s-early 60s, kind warm face with deep smile lines, round cheeks, olive-brown skin, wearing a cream/beige hijab headscarf wrapped village-style, signature GREEN AND YELLOW PLAID APRON (diamond weave pattern, primary green #1B9B00 on cream #FFF8E7 with yellow #EFD200 cross-threads) over a simple dark green or cream dress. Hands are flour-dusted, strong working hands. Expression: warm, confident, motherly authority. NO modern makeup. NO fashion hijab styling. Village-authentic.

physical_traits.face: Round cheeks, deep smile lines, kind dark brown eyes, warm expression
physical_traits.hair_covering: Cream/beige hijab wrapped in traditional village (Falaha) style - NOT modern fashion hijab
physical_traits.hands: Strong, flour-dusted, the hands of someone who has rolled thousands of grape leaves

signature_apron.description: Plaid v2 pattern apron - the single most recognizable brand element
signature_apron.colors: Green #1B9B00 on cream #FFF8E7 base with yellow #EFD200 cross-threads

wardrobe.under_dress: Simple, modest - dark green, cream, or earth-tone galabiya/dress
wardrobe.headscarf: Cream or beige, village-wrapped, slightly loose

mama_zainab.signature_line: In this kitchen, we do it the village way, or not at all.
do_not: Make her look modern or urban
Use fashion-forward hijab styling
Show her without the plaid apron in brand contexts
Make her skinny or model-like
Give her Western features
Show heavy makeup

shang_hong_wong.name: Shang Hong Wong
shang_hong_wong.visual_prompt_anchor: Chinese man, early-to-mid 60s, battle-scarred but dignified, lean athletic build, sharp intelligent eyes, short grey-white hair, clean-shaven or light stubble. TWO MODES: (1) WARRIOR MODE - dark silken traditional Chinese warrior robes, black/charcoal, standing dramatically on rooftops or pyramids; (2) BUSINESS MODE - premium minimalist linen suit, cream or light grey, understated luxury. Face shows a lifetime of combat but eyes show peace. Silhouette-heavy - often shown against windows or skylines.

physical_traits.build: Lean, athletic, the body of a retired fighter
physical_traits.face: Sharp features, battle scars (subtle), intelligent piercing eyes, short grey-white hair
physical_traits.expression: Calm authority, dangerous calm, the rare small smile

warrior_mode.description: Dark silken Chinese warrior robes - traditional, flowing

silhouette_mode.description: Shown only as a dark silhouette against bright windows
silhouette_mode.context: Scene 6 - the mysterious 'Banker' on the phone

do_not: Make him look comedic or cartoonish
Show him cooking - he judges, he does not cook
Remove the battle-worn gravitas
Make him look young or pretty-boy
Show him in casual/sloppy clothing

zuzu_the_goose.name: ZuZu
zuzu_the_goose.description_short: Mama Zainab's loyal white goose mascot - comedic, protective, brand icon
zuzu_the_goose.visual_prompt_anchor: Pure white domestic goose, plump and proud, wearing a small plaid ribbon (matching Mama Zainab's apron - green-on-cream diamond weave with yellow threads) around neck or as a tiny bow. Expressive orange beak, bright eyes, slightly mischievous posture. Often shown waddling beside Mama Zainab or giving a thumbs-up wing gesture. Comedic but lovable.

physical_traits.accessory: Small plaid ribbon matching apron pattern

do_not: Make it a duck or White Goose
Make it look aggressive or scary
Forget the plaid ribbon
Make it too small - it's a full-size goose

ghost_of_mama_zainab.name: Ghost of Mama Zainab
ghost_of_mama_zainab.description_short: An ethereal, younger version of Mama Zainab - visible only to her and ZuZu
ghost_of_mama_zainab.visual_prompt_anchor: Ethereal translucent figure of a younger Egyptian woman (30s), same facial features as Mama Zainab but younger and glowing. Semi-transparent with a soft greenish-golden luminescence. Wears a flowing white galabiya. Appears as a shimmer in the air. Serene, knowing expression. Visible only to Mama Zainab and ZuZu the Goose.
do_not: Make her look scary or horror-ghost
Show her as a completely different person from Mama Zainab
Make the glow blue or purple - it must be brand green-gold

packaging_design.system_note: All packaging uses cream #FFF8E7 as base, plaid_v2 pattern accents, and mahshi_green #1B9B00 as the dominant color

food_box.description: Main takeaway box - cream base with green plaid band wrapping, logo on lid

can_holder.description: Beverage can holder/sleeve - plaid pattern wrap with logo stamp

takeaway_column.description: Vertical takeaway pillar/column - tall branded container for stacked mahshi portions

sauce_station.description: Kiosk sauce dispensing area - branded panel with sauce labels

rules: Plaid pattern always present as accent band or wrap - never full-cover
Green #1B9B00 is the dominant packaging color
No gradients on packaging - flat brand colors only
ZuZu mascot may appear as a small stamp/icon on packaging

kiosk.description: Street-food kiosk with branded fascia, plaid trim, and digital menu board
kiosk.style: Clean, premium-casual - think Apple-store meets village kitchen

apron.description: The signature plaid apron - the most iconic single brand element

vehicle_wrap.description: Delivery/brand vehicle wrap - car sticker with logo and plaid accents

scene_to_brand_mapping.note: Maps each script scene to the required brand elements for Studio/video generation

prompt_anchors.description: Pre-built prompt fragments the Studio should auto-inject when generating brand content
prompt_anchors.palette_block: [BRAND PALETTE] Mahshi Green #1B9B00 | Brand Yellow #EFD200 | Brand Red #E60000 | Ink #2C292A | Cream #FFF8E7
prompt_anchors.plaid_block: Plaid v2: green-on-cream diamond weave with thin yellow cross-threads, rustic village-handwoven textile aesthetic

character_anchors.mama_zainab: Egyptian Falaha village woman, late 50s-60s, warm kind round face, olive-brown skin, cream hijab village-wrapped, signature green-and-yellow plaid diamond-weave apron over dark green dress, flour-dusted strong hands, no makeup, motherly authority
character_anchors.wong_warrior: Chinese man early 60s, lean battle-scarred, sharp eyes, grey-white hair, dark flowing silken warrior robes, dangerous calm, standing dramatically
character_anchors.wong_business: Chinese man early 60s, lean dignified, sharp eyes, grey-white hair, premium cream linen suit, minimalist, understated luxury, calm authority
character_anchors.wong_silhouette: Dark male silhouette against bright window, mysterious, only outline visible, backlit
character_anchors.zuzu: Pure white plump domestic goose, orange beak, wearing small green-cream-yellow plaid ribbon, mischievous but lovable, waddling
character_anchors.ghost: Semi-transparent ethereal young Egyptian woman 30s, glowing green-gold luminescence, flowing white galabiya, serene knowing expression

mandatory: ALWAYS inject palette_block when 'Append brand palette' is enabled
ALWAYS inject the correct character_anchor when a CHARACTER ANCHOR is selected
ALWAYS inject plaid_block when character wears apron or packaging is shown
NEVER generate Mama Zainab without the plaid apron in brand/marketing contexts
NEVER generate Wong cooking - he is the investor, not the cook
NEVER use blue, purple, or pink as dominant colors - they are off-brand
ALWAYS match Wong's wardrobe mode to the scene context
ZuZu must always have the plaid ribbon accessory

quality_gates.character_consistency: Compare generated face against asset_refs - reject if features don't match reference
quality_gates.palette_compliance: Dominant colors must be within brand palette - flag if >20% off-palette color
quality_gates.pattern_accuracy: Plaid must be diamond weave, not tartan/gingham/checkered
quality_gates.hijab_style: Must be village-wrapped, not modern fashion hijab

api_endpoint_spec.note: Schema for how Studio and Media Hub should consume this bible

endpoints.GET /brand/characters: Returns all character definitions with prompt_anchors
endpoints.GET /brand/characters/{id}: Returns single character with full visual_prompt_anchor
endpoints.GET /brand/pattern: Returns plaid pattern definition and prompt_anchor
endpoints.GET /brand/scene/{scene_id}: Returns scene-specific brand requirements from scene_to_brand_mapping
endpoints.GET /brand/packaging: Returns packaging design rules and asset refs
